subject: A dark clay or stone urn bearing the Single Strike emblem, glowing with an intense internal energy against a dramatic lit background.
description: The card depicts a squat, rough-textured urn or pot made of dark reddish-brown clay or stone. The urn features a prominent Single Strike logo badge on its body and glows from within, with warm amber-orange light emanating from its rim and the logo. The background is dark, with dramatic rim lighting that makes the urn appear significant and weighty. The art style is painted and textured, contrasting with the flatter style of some item cards.
foreground: dark clay urn with Single Strike logo badge, glowing amber from within
background: dark shadowed background with rim lighting
emotion: none — no figure present; object conveys weight and power
